fields.label: Reference Shift Type
fields.description: Shift start/end times are read dynamically from this Shift Type record. Avoids hardcoding literal times in scripts.

fields.label: Half Day Leave Type (dedicated)
fields.description: CRITICAL: must be a Leave Type with BOTH 'Is LWP' and 'Is Partially Paid Leave' UNTICKED. Using an LWP/PPL type here causes a double-deduction (verified against source: get_half_absent_days() and calculate_lwp_ppl_and_absent_days_based_on_attendance() are independent and both fire, subtracting payment_days twice, if this Leave Type is in leave_type_map). Create a dedicated Leave Type for this purpose, e.g. 'Attendance-Based Half Day', with no allocation policy needed.

fields.label: Late Mark Bands
fields.description: Add one row per time band, e.g. Label='9:46-10:00', From=09:46:00, To=10:00:00, Fraction=0.1667. Anything after the LATEST band's To Time triggers native Half Day instead of a fraction deduction. Maximum 5 bands (matches the fixed count columns on RAPL Late Mark Processing).

fields.label: Early Exit Cutoff (checkout before this = Half Day)
Minimum Overrun Minutes (regular days)
fields.description: On non-Sunday/non-holiday days, OT only counts if checkout is more than this many minutes past shift end.

fields.label: OT Hours Divisor
fields.description: Used as: monthly_salary / working_days / divisor = hourly OT rate. RAPL: 8 actual working hours (break excluded), even though shift span is 8.5 hours.

fields.label: OT Rate Base Fieldname (on Employee)
fields.description: Which Employee fieldname supplies the OT rate base. Change here if the field is ever renamed, without touching code.
